stemHtml: About a twin spool compressor in a gas turbine engine:

options.a: when operating at very high RPM, the later stages within the high pressure spool will have a large negative angle of attack.
options.b: the low pressure spool runs at a lower RPM than the high pressure spool.
options.c: the low pressure spool runs at a very high RPM, thus preventing the onset of compressor stall.
options.d: both spools run at the same RPM.
